FAVICON_GENERATOR_API_KEY.description: [DEPRECATED: We don't use RealFaviconGenerator anymore] RealFaviconGenerator [API key](https://realfavicongenerator.net/api/)

NEXT_PUBLIC_ACCOUNT_DYNAMIC_ENVIRONMENT_.description: Environment ID of the Dynamic project.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ADDRESS_3RD_PARTY_WIDGETS.description: Array of widget ids to be displayed

NEXT_PUBLIC_ADDRESS_3RD_PARTY_WIDGETS_CO.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) which contains mapping of widget names to their configuration. See [below](#address-3rd-party-widget-configuration-properties) list of available properties for a widget.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ADDRESS_USERNAME_TAG.description: Address profile API tag configuration properties. See [below](#user-profile-api-configuration-properties).
NEXT_PUBLIC_ADDRESS_USERNAME_TAG.type: {api_url: string; tag_link_template: string; tag_icon: string; tag_bg_color: string; tag_text_color: string}

NEXT_PUBLIC_ADVANCED_FILTER_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable "Advanced filter" page in the app

NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_ADBUTLER_CONFIG_DESKTOP.description: Placement config for desktop Adbutler banner
NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_ADBUTLER_CONFIG_DESKTOP.type: { id: string; width: string; height: string }

NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_ADBUTLER_CONFIG_MOBILE.description: Placement config for mobile Adbutler banner
NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_ADBUTLER_CONFIG_MOBILE.type: { id: string; width: number; height: number }

NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_BANNER_ADDITIONAL_PROVIDE.description: Additional ads provider to mix with the main one

NEXT_PUBLIC_AD_BANNER_ENABLE_SPECIFY.description: Enables Specify ads in addition to the main ad banner provider

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_PATH.description: Base path for Main API endpoint url

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_DOCS_ALERT_MESSAGE.description: Used for displaying custom alerts on the API documentation page. Could be a regular string or a HTML code.

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_DOCS_TABS.description: Controls which tabs appear on the API documentation page. Possible values for `TabId` are `rest_api`, `eth_rpc_api`, `rpc_api`, and `graphql_api`. **Note** that this variable has a default value, so the feature is enabled by default. Pass an empty array to disable it.

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_KEYS_ALERT_MESSAGE.description: Used for displaying custom alerts on the API keys page. Could be a regular string or a HTML code.

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_PORT.description: Port where API is running on the host

NEXT_PUBLIC_API_SPEC_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: The URL is now constructed automatically based on the configuration received from the API.] Spec of Blockscout core API to be displayed on the page.

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_ENV.description: App env (e.g development, staging, production, etc.).

NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_INSTANCE.description: Name of app instance. Used for app monitoring purposes. If not provided, it will be constructed from `NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_HOST`

NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH0_CLIENT_ID.description: [DEPRECATED: Variable is no longer required] Client id for [Auth0](https://auth0.com/) provider

NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Variable is no longer required] Account auth base url; it is used for building login URL (`${ NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_URL }/auth/auth0`) and logout return URL (`${ NEXT_PUBLIC_AUTH_URL }/auth/logout`); if not provided the base app URL will be used instead

NEXT_PUBLIC_BEACON_CHAIN_VALIDATOR_URL_T.description: Url template to build a link to validator. Should contain `{pk}` string that will be replaced with the validator's public key

NEXT_PUBLIC_BEACON_CHAIN_WITHDRAWALS_ONL.description: Set to true for networks that have only withdrawals (no deposits)

NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGED_TOKENS_BRIDGES.description: Used for displaying text about bridges types on the tokens page.

NEXT_PUBLIC_BRIDGED_TOKENS_CHAINS.description: Used for displaying filter by the chain from which token where bridged. Also, used for creating links to original tokens in other explorers.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CELO_ENABLED.description: Indicates that it is a Celo-based chain.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CELO_L2_UPGRADE_BLOCK.description: [DEPRECATED: Removed; configuration done on the API side] Indicates the block number when the Celo-type chain transitioned to L2. This is used to display links to the Epoch block page from a regular block page.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CLUSTERS_API_HOST.description: Clusters.xyz API endpoint for fetching cluster data, directory listings, and cross-chain address mappings

NEXT_PUBLIC_CLUSTERS_CDN_URL.description: CDN base URL for serving cluster profile images and avatars displayed in search results and cluster pages

NEXT_PUBLIC_COLOR_THEME_DEFAULT.example: Preferred color theme of the app

NEXT_PUBLIC_COLOR_THEME_OVERRIDES.description: Color overrides for the default theme; pass a JSON-like string that represents a subset of the `DEFAULT_THEME_COLORS` object (see `toolkit/theme/foundations/colors.ts`) to customize the app's main colors. See [here](https://www.figma.com/design/4In0X8UADoZaTfZ34HaZ3K/Blockscout-design-system?node-id=29124-23813&t=XOv4ahHUSsTDlNkN-4) the Figma worksheet with description of available color tokens.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CONTRACT_CODE_IDES.description: Used to build up links to IDEs with contract source code.

NEXT_PUBLIC_CROSS_CHAIN_TXS_ENABLED.description: The flag that enables the feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_DATA_AVAILABILITY_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable blob transactions views.

NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFI_DROPDOWN_ITEMS.description: An array of dropdown items containing the button text, icon name and dappId in Dappscout or an external url
NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFI_DROPDOWN_ITEMS.type: [{ text: string; icon?: string; dappId?: string, url?: string, isEssentialDapp?: boolean }]

NEXT_PUBLIC_DEX_POOLS_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable the feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_FAULT_PROOF_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` for chains with fault proof system enabled (Optimistic stack only)

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURED_NETWORKS.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) or file content string representation. It contains list of featured networks that will be shown in the network menu. See [below](#featured-network-configuration-properties) list of available properties for particular network

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURED_NETWORKS_ALL_LINK.description: Link to the all chains resource. Will be displayed at the bottom of featured networks list.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURED_NETWORKS_MODE.default: Works only if NEXT_PUBLIC_FEATURED_NETWORKS is set

NEXT_PUBLIC_FLASHBLOCKS_SOCKET_URL.description: Public WebSocket endpoint to stream Flashblocks data

NEXT_PUBLIC_FONT_FAMILY_BODY.description: Main typeface to use in page content elements.

NEXT_PUBLIC_FONT_FAMILY_HEADING.description: Special typeface to use in page headings (`<h1>`, `<h2>`, etc.)

NEXT_PUBLIC_FOOTER_LINKS.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) or file content string representation. It contains list of link groups to be displayed in the footer. See [below](#footer-links-configuration-properties) list of available properties for particular group

NEXT_PUBLIC_GAME_BADGE_CLAIM_LINK.description: Provide to enable the easter egg badge feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_GAS_REFUEL_PROVIDER_CONFIG.type: { name: string; url_template: string; dapp_id?: string; logo?: string }

NEXT_PUBLIC_GAS_TRACKER_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable "Gas tracker" in the app

NEXT_PUBLIC_GRAPHIQL_TRANSACTION.description: [DEPRECATED: Removed, as the latest transaction hash has now being obtained from the API.] Txn hash for default query at GraphQl API.

NEXT_PUBLIC_HAS_BEACON_CHAIN.description: Set to true for networks with the beacon chain

NEXT_PUBLIC_HAS_CONTRACT_AUDIT_REPORTS.description: Set to `true` to enable Submit Audit form on the contract page

NEXT_PUBLIC_HAS_MUD_FRAMEWORK.description: Set to `true` for instances that use MUD framework (Optimistic stack only)

NEXT_PUBLIC_HAS_USER_OPS.description: Set to true to show user operations related data and pages

NEXT_PUBLIC_HELIA_VERIFIED_FETCH_ENABLED.description: Indicates that the [Helia verified fetch](https://github.com/ipfs/helia-verified-fetch/tree/main/packages/verified-fetch) should be used for retrieving content of NFT assets (currently limited to images) directly from IPFS network using trustless gateways.

NEXT_PUBLIC_HIDE_INDEXING_ALERT_BLOCKS.description: Set to `true` to hide indexing alert in the page header about indexing chain's blocks

NEXT_PUBLIC_HIDE_INDEXING_ALERT_INT_TXS.description: Set to `true` to hide indexing alert in the page footer about indexing block's internal transactions

NEXT_PUBLIC_HIDE_NATIVE_COIN_PRICE.description: Set to `true` to hide the native coin price in the top bar

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_HIGHLIGHTS_CONFIG.description: URL of the file (in `.json` format only) that contains the configuration for banners on the application's homepage, showcasing some of its key functionality. See the full config format [below](#highlights-banner-configuration-properties). The config should contain at least 2 banners, but only 3 banners will be visible at the same time. A larger number of banners in the config allows for random banner rotation upon page load.

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_PLATE_BACKGROUND.description: [DEPRECATED: v2.4.0+] Background css value for hero plate on the homepage (escape "#" symbol if you use HEX color codes or use rgba-value instead).

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_PLATE_TEXT_COLOR.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_HERO_BANNER_CONFIG] Text color of the hero plate on the homepage (escape "#" symbol if you use HEX color codes or use rgba-value instead).

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_SHOW_AVG_BLOCK_TIME.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_STATS] Set to false if average block time is useless for the network

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOMEPAGE_SHOW_GAS_TRACKER.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_GAS_TRACKER_ENABLED] Set to false if network doesn't have gas tracker

NEXT_PUBLIC_HOT_CONTRACTS_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable the feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_INTERCHAIN_INDEXER_API_HOST.description: Interchain indexer API service host used to fetch cross-chain transaction data and metadata

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_ACCOUNT_SUPPORTED.description: Set to true if network has account feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_OPTIMISTIC_L2_NETWORK.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_TYPE] Set to true for optimistic L2 solutions

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_SUAVE_CHAIN.description: Set to true for blockchains with [SUAVE architecture](https://writings.flashbots.net/mevm-suave-centauri-and-beyond)

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_TESTNET.description: Set to true if network is testnet

NEXT_PUBLIC_IS_ZKEVM_L2_NETWORK.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_TYPE] Set to true for zkevm L2 solutions

NEXT_PUBLIC_L1_BASE_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Renamed to NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_L1_BASE_URL] Blockscout base URL for L1 network

NEXT_PUBLIC_LOGOUT_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Variable is no longer required] Account logout url. Required if account is supported for the app instance.

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_BANNER_CONTENT_U.description: URL of the banner HTML content

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_BANNER_LINK_URL.description: URL of the page the banner leads to

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_CATEGORIES_URL.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) which contains the list of categories to be displayed on the marketplace page in the specified order. If no URL is provided, then the list of categories will be compiled based on the `categories` fields from the marketplace (apps) configuration file

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_CONFIG_URL.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) which contains list of apps that will be shown on the marketplace page. See [below](#marketplace-app-configuration-properties) list of available properties for an app. Can be replaced with NEXT_PUBLIC_ADMIN_SERVICE_API_HOST

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_ENABLED.description: `true` means that the marketplace page will be enabled

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_ESSENTIAL_DAPPS_.description: The flag enables ad in essential dapps. *Feature is enabled by default; pass `false` to disable it.*
Configuration of the essential dapps to be displayed on the Marketplace page

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_FEATURED_APP.description: ID of the featured application to be displayed on the banner on the Marketplace page

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_GRAPH_LINKS_URL.description: URL of the file (`.json` format only) which contains the list of The Graph links to be displayed on the Marketplace page

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_RATING_AIRTABLE_.description: [DEPRECATED: Removed; now the ratings come from the API] Airtable API key for dapp ratings
[DEPRECATED: Removed; now the ratings come from the API] Airtable base ID with dapp ratings

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_SECURITY_REPORTS.description: [DEPRECATED: Removed; we don't support this feature anymore] URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) which contains app security reports for displaying security scores on the Marketplace page

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_SUBMIT_FORM.description: Link to form where authors can submit their dapps to the marketplace

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_SUGGEST_IDEAS_FO.description: Link to form where users can suggest ideas for the marketplace

NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_TITLES.description: Used to override default titles of the Marketplace and dapps
NEXT_PUBLIC_MARKETPLACE_TITLES.type: { entity_name?: string; menu_item?: string; title?: string; subtitle_essential_dapps?: string; subtitle_list?: string }

NEXT_PUBLIC_MAX_CONTENT_WIDTH_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to restrict the page content width on extra-large screens.

NEXT_PUBLIC_MEGA_ETH_SOCKET_URL_METRICS.description: Public WebSocket endpoint for streaming statistics data, used to display information on the uptime dashboard page.

NEXT_PUBLIC_MEGA_ETH_SOCKET_URL_RPC.description: Public WebSocket endpoint for streaming RPC node data, including mini-block data.

NEXT_PUBLIC_METADATA_ADDRESS_TAGS_UPDATE.description: Enables requests to the Metadata Service to schedule an update for address tags after the user visits the address page in the app.

NEXT_PUBLIC_METASUITES_ENABLED.description: Set to true to enable integration

NEXT_PUBLIC_MIXPANEL_CONFIG_OVERRIDES.description: Pass a JSON-like string that represents a subset of the [Mixpanel SDK configuration](https://docs.mixpanel.com/docs/tracking-methods/sdks/javascript#library-configuration) to override the project's default properties.

NEXT_PUBLIC_MULTICHAIN_BALANCE_PROVIDER_.type: [{ name: string; url_template: string; dapp_id?: string; logo: string }]

NEXT_PUBLIC_MULTICHAIN_CLUSTER.description: Chain's cluster name; used to construct the full URL for requests to the aggregator API service

NEXT_PUBLIC_MULTICHAIN_ENABLED.description: The flag that enables the feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_NAME_SERVICE_PROTOCOLS.description: List of the protocols used by the chain. The protocol ids can be obtained from [/api/v1/protocols](https://bens.services.blockscout.com/api/v1/protocols) resource.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NAVIGATION_HIDDEN_LINKS.description: [DEPRECATED: Use NEXT_PUBLIC_API_DOCS_TABS instead to hide tabs on the API docs page.] List of external links hidden in the navigation. Supported ids are `eth_rpc_api`, `rpc_api`

NEXT_PUBLIC_NAVIGATION_HIGHLIGHTED_ROUTE.description: List of menu item routes that should have a lightning label

NEXT_PUBLIC_NAVIGATION_PROMO_BANNER_CONF.description: Configuration of promo banner in the navigation menu. See [below](#navigation-promo-banner-configuration-properties) list of available properties for particular banner type

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ADDITIONAL_TOKEN_TYP.description: List of additional **ERC-20-like (fungible)** token types supported by the explorer UI (extends token type filters/labels). *Note: the token type id must also be supported by the backend API responses and filters.*

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_CURRENCY_GWEI_NAME.description: Name of the giga-unit of the native currency (e.g., 'gwei' for Ethereum, where 1 gwei = 10^9 of the smallest unit). Used for displaying gas prices in a more readable format throughout the UI.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_CURRENCY_WEI_NAME.description: Name of the smallest unit of the native currency (e.g., 'wei' for Ethereum, where 1 ETH = 10^18 wei). Used for displaying gas prices and transaction fees in the smallest denomination.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_EXPLORERS.description: Used to build up links to transactions, blocks, addresses in other chain explorers.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_GOVERNANCE_TOKEN_SYM.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_SECONDARY_COIN_SYMBOL] Network governance token symbol

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ICON.description: Network icon; used as a replacement for regular network logo when nav bar is collapsed; if not provided, placeholder will be shown; *Note* the icon size should be at least 60px by 60px

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_ICON_DARK.description: Network icon for dark color mode; if not provided, **inverted** regular icon will be used instead

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_LOGO.description: Network logo; if not provided, placeholder will be shown; *Note* the logo height should be 24px and width less than 120px

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_LOGO_DARK.description: Network logo for dark color mode; if not provided, **inverted** regular logo will be used instead

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_MULTIPLE_GAS_CURRENC.description: Set to `true` for networks where users can pay transaction fees in either the native coin or ERC-20 tokens.

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_SHORT_NAME.description: Used for SEO attributes (e.g, page description)

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_TOKEN_STANDARD_NAME.description: Name of the standard for creating tokens

NEXT_PUBLIC_NETWORK_VERIFICATION_TYPE.default: Verification type in the network. Irrelevant for Arbitrum (verification type is always `posting`) and ZkEvm (verification type is always `sequencing`) L2s

NEXT_PUBLIC_OG_DESCRIPTION.example: Open-source block explorer by Blockscout. Search transactions, verify smart contracts, analyze addresses, and track network activity. Complete blockchain data and APIs for the %network_title% network.

NEXT_PUBLIC_OG_ENHANCED_DATA_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to populate OG tags (title, description) with API data for social preview robot requests

NEXT_PUBLIC_OG_IMAGE_URL.description: OG image url. Minimum image size is 200 x 20 pixels (recommended: 1200 x 600); maximum supported file size is 8 MB; 2:1 aspect ratio; supported formats: image/jpeg, image/gif, image/png

NEXT_PUBLIC_OPTIMISTIC_L2_WITHDRAWAL_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Renamed to NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_L2_WITHDRAWAL_URL] URL for optimistic L2 -> L1 withdrawals

NEXT_PUBLIC_OTHER_LINKS.description: List of links for the "Other" navigation menu

NEXT_PUBLIC_PROMOTE_BLOCKSCOUT_IN_TITLE.description: Set to `true` to promote Blockscout in meta and OG titles

NEXT_PUBLIC_PUZZLE_GAME_BADGE_CLAIM_LINK.description: Provide to enable the easter egg puzzle badge feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_RE_CAPTCHA_V3_APP_SITE_KEY.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced with NEXT_PUBLIC_RE_CAPTCHA_APP_SITE_KEY] Google reCAPTCHA v3 site key

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLBAR_CLIENT_TOKEN.description: Client token for your Rollbar project

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_DA_CELESTIA_CELENIUM_.description: URL for the Selenium explorer. It is used to create links to the Data Availability Blobs page. The URL should contain the full path without any search parameters related to the blob, as these will be constructed at runtime for each blob separately. Available only for Optimistic or Arbitrum roll-ups.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_DA_CELESTIA_NAMESPACE.description: Hex-string for creating a link to the transaction batch on the [Celenium explorer](https://celenium.io). "0x"-format and 60 symbol length. Available only for Arbitrum roll-ups.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_HOMEPAGE_SHOW_LATEST_.description: Set to `true` to display "Latest blocks" widget instead of "Latest batches" on the home page

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_L1_BASE_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced with NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_PARENT_CHAIN] Blockscout base URL for parent network.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_L2_WITHDRAWAL_URL.description: URL for rollup to parent chain withdrawals (Optimistic stack only)

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_PARENT_CHAIN.description: Configuration parameters for the parent chain.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_PARENT_CHAIN_NAME.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced with `NEXT_PUBLIC_ROLLUP_PARENT_CHAIN`] Set to customize L1 transaction status labels in the UI (e.g., "Sent to <chain-name>"). This setting is applicable only for Arbitrum-based chains.

NEXT_PUBLIC_SAFE_TX_SERVICE_URL.description: The Safe transaction service URL. See full list of supported networks [here](https://docs.safe.global/api-supported-networks).

NEXT_PUBLIC_SAVE_ON_GAS_ENABLED.description: [DEPRECATED: Feature is deprecated.] Set to "true" to enable the feature

NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_DSN.description: [DEPRECATED: Feature is no longer supported] Client key for your Sentry.io app

NEXT_PUBLIC_SENTRY_ENABLE_TRACING.description: [DEPRECATED: Feature is no longer supported] Enables tracing and performance monitoring in Sentry.io

NEXT_PUBLIC_SEO_ENHANCED_DATA_ENABLED.description: Set to `true` to pre-render page titles (e.g Token page) on the server side and inject page h1-tag to the markup before it is sent to the browser.

NEXT_PUBLIC_STATS_API_BASE_PATH.description: Base path for Stats API endpoint url

NEXT_PUBLIC_SWAP_BUTTON_URL.description: [DEPRECATED: Replaced by NEXT_PUBLIC_DEFI_DROPDOWN_ITEMS] Application ID in the marketplace or website URL

NEXT_PUBLIC_TAC_OPERATION_LIFECYCLE_API_.description: URL for the TAC Operation Lifecycle service.

NEXT_PUBLIC_TAC_TON_EXPLORER_URL.description: URL of the Ton chain explorer. This is used to build links to transactions and addresses on the Ton chain.

NEXT_PUBLIC_TRANSACTION_INTERPRETATION_P.default: Transaction interpretation provider that displays human readable transaction description

NEXT_PUBLIC_TX_EXTERNAL_TRANSACTIONS_CON.description: Configuration of the external transactions links that should be added to the transaction details.
NEXT_PUBLIC_TX_EXTERNAL_TRANSACTIONS_CON.type: { chain_name: string; chain_logo_url: string; explorer_url_template: string; }

NEXT_PUBLIC_USER_OPS_INDEXER_API_HOST.description: The user operations indexer API host; pass to show API documentation for the service

NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_NEXT_JS_PROXY.description: Tells the app to proxy all APIs request through the NextJS app. **We strongly advise not to use it in the production environment**, since it can lead to performance issues of the NodeJS server

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_ADDRESS_HIDDEN_VIEWS.description: Address views that should not be displayed. See below the list of the possible id values.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_ADDRESS_IDENTICON_TYPE.since: Default style of address identicon appearance. Choose between [GitHub](https://github.blog/2013-08-14-identicons/), [Metamask Jazzicon](https://metamask.github.io/jazzicon/), [Gradient Avatar](https://github.com/varld/gradient-avatar), [Ethereum Blocky](https://mycryptohq.github.io/ethereum-blockies-base64/) and [Nouns](https://nouns.wtf)

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_ADDRESS_NATIVE_TOKEN_A.description: The address of a native ERC-20 token that shadows the balance of the native coin; used to exclude its balance from the net worth value of user tokens.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_BLOCK_HIDDEN_FIELDS.description: Array of the block fields ids that should be hidden. See below the list of the possible id values.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_BLOCK_PENDING_UPDATE_A.description: The flag enables indication of the incomplete data for the block in the list and detailed views of the re-indexing block and its transactions. *Feature is enabled by default; pass `false` to disable it.*

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_CONTRACT_DECODED_BYTEC.description: If set to true, the deployed bytecode for unverified contracts will be parsed on the client side to retrieve the source code. If successful, the source code will be displayed in the snippet along with the content type selector. This feature works only for Scilla contracts.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_CONTRACT_LANGUAGE_FILT.deprecatedSince: Pass an array of contract languages that will be displayed as options in the filter on the verified contract page.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_CONTRACT_SOLIDITYSCAN_.description: Set to `true` if SolidityScan reports are supported

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_NFT_MARKETPLACES.description: Used to build up links to NFT collections and NFT instances in external marketplaces.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_TOKEN_SCAM_TOGGLE_ENAB.description: Show the "Hide scam tokens" toggle in the site settings dropdown. This option controls the visibility of tokens with a poor reputation in the search results.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_TX_ADDITIONAL_FIELDS.description: Array of the additional fields ids that should be added to the transaction details. See below the list of the possible id values.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_TX_GROUPED_FEES.description: In the detailed view group transaction fees under one collapsible section.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VIEWS_TX_HIDDEN_FIELDS.description: Array of the transaction fields ids that should be hidden. See below the list of the possible id values.

NEXT_PUBLIC_VISUALIZE_API_BASE_PATH.description: Base path for Visualize API endpoint url

NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLET_CONNECT_FEATURED_WALL.description: List of [featured wallet IDs](https://docs.reown.com/appkit/react/core/options#featuredwalletids) in the "Connect your wallet" modal. To obtain the wallet ID, please use [WalletGuild](https://walletguide.walletconnect.network).

NEXT_PUBLIC_WEB3_DISABLE_ADD_TOKEN_TO_WA.description: Set to `true` to hide icon "Add to your wallet" next to token addresses

NEXT_PUBLIC_XSTAR_SCORE_URL.description: XStar XHS score documentation URL for the address tag. Enables the XStar score feature.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ZETACHAIN_EXTERNAL_SEARCH_CO.description: List of objects with regex, template and name fields to build redirect links for external searches. The first matching regex will be used to generate the URL from the provided hash.

NEXT_PUBLIC_ZETACHAIN_SERVICE_API_HOST.description: ZetaChain cross-chain transactions service API endpoint url

NEXT_PUBLIC_ZETACHAIN_SERVICE_CHAINS_CON.description: URL of configuration file (`.json` format only) which contains chains info for the supported chains.

OTEL_SDK_ENABLED.description: Run-time flag to enable the feature

SENTRY_CSP_REPORT_URI.description: [DEPRECATED: Feature is no longer supported] URL for sending CSP-reports to your Sentry.io app
